---
title: "Tidy Data"
author: "John Robin Inston"
date: "2025-03-16"
date-modified: "2026-03-16"
toc: true
title-block-banner: false
sidebar: pstat100-notes
page-navigation: true
---

## Tidy Data

In the wild most data is provided in tables.  This tabular data can be provided in many possible layouts with few organizational contraints.  We begin by considering
